title: The One With Rachel's Big Kiss

lines.text: Central Perk, Joey, Monica, and Rachel are sitting on the couch and Ross is sitting on the chair, and they're all talking.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! Out of all of us, who do you think is gonna get married next?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Probably Monica and Chandler.
A woman walks up to Gunther in the background.

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: (to Gunther) Hi. Could I have a pack of Newport Lights, please?

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: Oh umm, uh we don't sell cigarettes, but they have them at the newsstand across the street. (Points.)

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: That'd be great, thanks. (Gunther goes and gets them.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (to the gang) Oh my God, Melissa Warburton. I don't think I have the energy for this.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: (Gasps when she notices Rachel) Oh my God! Ray-ray Green?! (Screams)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (screaming) Melissa!

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: You have been M.I.A for the past seven sorority newsletters, what's up with you?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wh-(Turns and looks at the gang who's staring)-Why don't I tell you over here? (She walks Melissa away from the gang.)

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: So last I heard you were gonna get married. (Grabs Rachel's hand and notices that she doesn't have a ring on it.) (Sadly) Oh poor Ray-ray.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no-no, no! It's good! It's all good! I-I actually work at Ralph Lauren!

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Shut up!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I will not! I'm the divisional head of men's sportswear!

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Oh shut up more! Now, are you friends with Ralph?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh please...

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: (excitedly) Are you?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Listen, we-we have to have dinner. What-what are you doing tomorrow night?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh tomorrow, oh I don't know. Um...

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: You do now. You're having dinner with me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Shut up.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: I-I've got to go. This has been so great Ray-ray! (Gunther returns with her cigarettes.) Oh, there you are. (Takes them from Gunther.) (To Rachel) Umm, so listen, just call me. Here's my card. (Hands the card over.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, wow thanks! (Reading the card) Oh you're in real estate!

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Oh no, that's-that's an old card. Umm, I wanted to get out of that and-and do something where I can really help people and-and make a difference.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! What do you do now?

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: (quietly) I'm a party planner. I'll see you tomorrow. (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay! (Joins the rest of the gang.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey guys! Look who's back! It's Ray-ray!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Shut up that was my friend Melissa from college.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: She seems really, really fun!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's actually very sweet and we used to be very close.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait a minute, she isn't... She's not the one who you...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (excitedly) Who you what? Who you what?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Monica) Yes.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (excitedly) Wow? Wow what?! Wow what?! Who you-what?!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's not a big deal!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Joey) They were lovers.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No we weren't! It was nothing! It was one night, senior year we went to a party, had a lot of sangria and y'know, ended up...kissing for a bit.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So that's two of my wives.
Opening Credits
Monica and Chandler's, Monica is working on the seating chart while Chandler looks on and Rachel reads.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (telling Chandler the seating arrangement) Okay so this is where the band is. (Points.) And this is where the bar is. (Points) And all these pins have people's names on them. (She has pins to show the seating at each of the tables.) And Rach, here you are. (Points to Rachel's place.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh wow. Why don't we just take me (Grabs her pin) and put me with a Manhattan in my hand, talking to the cute bartender. (Puts her pin at the bar and laughs. Monica just glares at her.) These pins aren't for playing are they?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Chandler) Okay, the red ones are my guests and the blue ones are yours.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This is so sad. I mean, I only have like ten pins.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, relax it's not a contest. (To Rachel) Certainly not a close one.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hello!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Rach. (Stares at her.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Stop picturing it!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, I think that's it. The seating chart is done. This is our wedding. They all look like they're having fun don't they?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, so where are my parents gonna be?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh! (Gets up) Let's see, well...if this is the wedding hall then umm (Walks away) you're parents will be at home in Queens.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What they're not invited?! Oh no, that's terrible! They're gonna be crushed!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why would they think they're invited?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (looking around) You got me. I don't...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I'm sorry. I thought parents were coming! Y'know? Your parents are comin'! Chandler's parents are comin'! Ross's parents are comin'!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ross's parents are my parents!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well-well-see? Parents are comin'!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know I think we should invite them.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh please, you just want more blue pins.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well this is just sad!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, all right. Maybe I can fit them in if I just do some rearranging. But uh, Rachel may actually have to sit at the bar!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That is not a problem.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (leaning down to her) Maybe you'll order a little sangria?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, get out of here! (Jumps back and walks away.)
Ralph Lauren, Rachel is showing Chandler the selection of tuxedos.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (motioning to a rack) So now, these are all the tuxedos that we make and if there's anything that you like, we can make you a deal. Anything at all. (Grabs a few) But these are the three that Monica pre-approved.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, thanks a lot for hookin' me up Rach. I want you to know that I want you to attend our wedding as my guest.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm Monica's maid of honor. Okay? Don't try to blue pin me!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (sees another rack) Well, what's the deal with these? These-these look nice.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh they are nice. We-we custom-make tuxedos for celebrities and then when they're done with them they just send 'em back.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You mean like for award shows?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Some of them.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You mean these tuxes have been down the red carpet with people yelling, "You are you wearing?! You look fabulous!"

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Honey, might I suggest watching a little more ESPN and a little less E!?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, who wore those? (Points to the tuxedos.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Umm, well let's see uh, this one is Tom Brokaw.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Not bad.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (reading a tag) This one is uh Paul O'Neil.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who's that?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: He plays for the Yankees. Seriously, ESPN! Just once and a while, have it on in the background. (Chandler nods and Rachel grabs another tux) Ooh, this one was Pierce Brosnan!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Pierce Brosnan?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: 007?! This is James Bond's tux?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I have to get married in James Bond's tux!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's a pretty cool tux.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, it's not just that, I would be England's most powerful weapon. Jet setting heartbreaker on her majesty's secret service. A man who fears no one; with a license to kill. (Worried.) Would Monica let me wear this?
Joey and Rachel's, Joey and Phoebe are moving chess pieces around on the board and hitting the timer at random.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We should really learn how to play the real way. (Moves another piece.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I like our way. Oh! (Grabs a piece and jumps a bunch of Joey's like in Checkers.) Chess!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nice move.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So Joey I just hooked Ross and Chandler up with some tuxedos for the wedding, do you need one?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, I'm performing the ceremony. I'm not wearing a tux.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, what are you going to wear?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Multi-colored robes! Ooh, and maybe a hat.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Huh. Does Monica know about this?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't think so.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Can I please be there when you tell her? (Joey nods yes.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey oh, Rach wait! Do you want to go to a movie tonight?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, y'know what? I can't. I have to have dinner with that Melissa girl.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (excitedly) Can I come?! I won't even talk! You'll just hear the noise from my video camera.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What is this? What's going on?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh good! Can I tell her?! Can I tell her?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, do you want to hear what actually happened or Joey's lewd version?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey's!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, come on! I had this friend from college and I made the stupid mistake of telling Joey that one time...she and I y'know...kissed a little bit.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (laughs) Yeah, I'm sure that happened.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It-it did!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey. (Laughs then seriously) It happened!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, it was senior year in college. It was after the Sigma Chi luau and Melissa and I got very drunk! And we ended up kissing! For several minutes!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Joey) Which means she had a couple spritzers and a quick peck on the cheek.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why are you taking this away from me?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, why is it so hard for you to believe?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay! I just-I didn't know that you are a lesbian. (Joey smiles and nods lewdly.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm not saying that I'm a lesbian! I'm just saying that this happened!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, it just seems pretty wild and you're so-y'know so...vanilla.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (shocked) Vanilla?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm not vanilla! I've done lots of crazy things! I mean I got-I got drunk and married in Vegas!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: To Ross.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, y'know what? If you don't want to believe me about this, why don't you just come with me to dinner tonight and she will tell you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay! All right! Yeah! 'Cause I just can't picture it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh-ho, you should get inside my head.
Central Perk, Chandler is on the couch reading as Ross enters carrying a garment bag.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! Guess what I got for your wedding! (Holding up his garment bag.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: A freakish thin date with a hanger for her head?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No. Rachel hooked me up with a tux! But not just any tux, Batman's tux!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's right! Made expressly for Val Kilmer and worn by him in the hit film...that Batman film he was in.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You can't wear that! I'm wearing the famous tux! James Bond's tux!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So-If you wear that you'll make mine less special.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, you need something to make this day special? Hello! You-you-you have the most special thing of all! You are marrying the woman you love.
Chandler mimics him.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Please, don't take away my cool thing. Please?! Pretty please?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Pretty please? Not very uh, 007.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, it's my wedding day okay? If you were getting married I would never do anything to upset you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: When I got married you slept with my sister.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That was pretty 007.
Monica and Chandler's, Monica is still working on the seating chart as Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey. Oh good-good you're here! All right, I figured it out. I'm gonna take two tables of eight, I'm gonna add your parents, and I'm gonna turn them into three tables of six. Okay? And I called the caterer; I added two extra meals, we are good to go!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, they're not coming.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (looking at him) What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Somehow they got the idea that you only invited them because of me. They...feel a little unwanted.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh that's too bad. It's true, but too bad.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look Mon, if you could just call my mom...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come on! Look just-just tell-let her know that you really want them to be there. Let's not forget, this is a woman that has sent you many lasagnas over the years.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No she hasn't.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Is it her fault that some of them didn't make it to you?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, what am I going to say?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know. Just uh, just tell 'em it was a mix-up with the invitations, or-No-no-no! Blame it on the post office. They hate the post office. And the Irish! But I don't think you can blame it on them so... (He dials the phone and hands it to Monica.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on phone) Hello? (Listens) Yeah, hi! Mrs. Tribbiani? (Listens) Hi, this is Monica Geller. (Listens) Yeah I'm just calling to say that Chandler and I uh, really hope you can make it to the wedding. Yeah, apparently a bunch of invitations that we sent weren't delivered. Umm, I guess there was some screw up at the damn post office! (Joey nods his approval.) (Listens) T-Tell me about it! (Listens) Yeah, yeah, the US Post Office? No, more like US lost office! (Listens) What are they Irish?! (Joey gives her a thumbs up.)
A restaurant, Melissa, Rachel, and Phoebe are talking.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: ...anyway, his name is Allan and we've been going out for three years. He was my first client when I became a party planner. He was planning a party for his girlfriend at the time. Oh well. (Rachel and Phoebe politely laugh) And he was Theta Beta Pi at Syracuse.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh. Oh, that's great!

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Hmm Phoebe, were you ever in a sorority?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Of course! Yeah, I was uh, umm Thigh Mega Tampon.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: What one?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! Y'know, we were really huge too, but then they had to shut us down when Regina Philange died of alcohol poisoning.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Oh, isn't a shame when one girl ruins it for the whole bunch? (Phoebe agrees by grunting.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (changing the subject) Anyway, speaking of drinking too much. I was uh, tellin' Phoebe about that one crazy night after the Sigma Chi luau where you and I uh, we made out.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: (shocked) What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Remember?! We-come on both had the sarongs on, and we had the-the coconut bikini tops...

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: ...we went back the house and we got really silly and we...we made out.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Oh wow, Ray-ray I have no idea what you're talking about.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really?!
Commercial Break
Monica and Chandler's, Monica is on the couch as Chandler disgustedly enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross is Batman!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, he did manage to keep his identity secret for a long time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Rachel got Ross the tuxedo that Val Kilmer wore in Batman. Okay Batman is so much cooler than James Bond!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you talking about?! 007 has all those gadgets!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Batman has a utility belt!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: 007 has a fancy car!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Batman has the Batmobile!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: 007 gets all the ladies.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Batman has Robin! (Pause) We get ESPN right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How about you go put on your 007 tuxedo and I'll make you a nice martini.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Actually, I don't like martinis.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How about a Youhoo with a funny straw?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ooh, yum! (Runs into the bedroom.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Listen, I know the invitation says 6:00, but does that mean that you want people to get there at six, or the show is gonna start right at six?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The show?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Right. Right. The wedding, gotcha. But I mean, it's gonna start a little late right? I mean, weddings start late. Right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Have you ever been to one of my weddings?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah. Yeah. Well look, the thing is it's the same day as my niece's christening and I really want my parents to be there in time to see me. 'Cause my part's just in the beginning I'm not even in the rest of the show-Wedding!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The wedding starts at six.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Okay, I totally hear ya. Oo how about this? I vamp a little 'til they get there?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You'll vamp?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Yeah y'know, like warm up the crowd. Ask 'em where they're from. 'Cause in Joey Tribbiani you get a minister and you get an entertainer. I'm a minis-tainer! (Rapping) There is no one better! There is no one greater!
The restaurant, continued from earlier.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: How can you not remember us kissing?!

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: I don't know. I don't remember a lot of things that never happened.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wh... Come on! Remember? We were on the sleeping porch! We couldn't stop giggling? And our coconuts kept knockin' together?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, somewhere Joey's head is exploding.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah-but come on-Listen, I'm sorry I don't want to make you uncomfortable, but I told Phoebe that it happened and she doesn't believe me.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: I'm sorry Ray-ray. I mean if I thought it happened I would say it. Maybe I passed out and you did stuff to me while I was sleeping.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Rachel, it's okay. You don't have to do this. I believe you. All right? Okay, if-if you say that you kissed Melissa, then you kissed Melissa.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank you Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: She didn't.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know.
Monica and Chandler's, Monica and Chandler are working on the seating chart as Ross enters carrying his tux around.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You just carry that around?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes. I find it to be something of a conversation piece.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Between you and...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Gunther. (To Chandler) Hey-hey! Why don't we put them on? Y'know get a picture of Batman and James Bond together.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I would but mine doesn't fit. The pants are a little tight.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: A little tight? I could see double-oh and seven in those pants.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well that stinks. I was looking forward to us wearing our celebrity tuxes together.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, does that mean that you're not going to wearing yours?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What are you kidding? It's Batman's tux!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (standing up) Let me try it on!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, but just the jacket. Double-oh and seven are not gettin' in there.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (trying on the jacket) Okay. Holy double-vented comfort Batman! (Finds something in the pocket) What's this?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: An invitation for the At First Sight premiere? Oh my God! Val Kilmer didn't wear this in Batman! He wore it to the premiere of some tooty-fruity love story where he played a blind guy!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Let me see that! (Grabs the invitation and reads it.) Oh man!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The only superpower you have is a slightly heightened sense of smell. (Hands him the jacket and walks away.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey! Uh, Monica? Chandler? Can I talk to you guys for a second?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right that's it, I give up! Whatever you want you can have it! You wanna sing a song? You wanna do a dance? You want your mom stand at the Alter and scream racial slurs? I don't care!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No, I-I just wanna thank you guys for what you did for my parents, that was really sweet. They're so happy they get to be a part of your special day.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (defeated) Oh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, you're welcome. And tell them we're really glad they're coming.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. I will. Ohh! Check out what they got me to wear for the ceremony! (Runs to his apartment and returns wearing a rather silly hat.) Huh? I wear it like this when I marry you guys, and then this (He tilts it to the side of his head) is for party time.
Outside the restaurant, Melissa, Phoebe, and Rachel are emerging.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It happened! I am telling you it happened!

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Okay. (To Phoebe) Well, it was great meeting you. And uh Rachel, I-I don't think I'll be calling you (hails a cab) because umm, y'know you've gotten weird. (The cab pulls up.) Take care you guys.
She's about to get in when...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?! Wait a minute! No wait a minute! (She does so.) Okay? Look, that night was the one wild thing I have ever done in my entire life, and I'm not gonna let you take that away from me! Okay, so if you don't remember that, maybe you will remember this! (She grabs Melissa and kisses her on the lips.)

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: My God! You love me!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (shocked) What?

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Of course I remember our kiss. I think about it all the time. I can still hear the coconuts knockin' together I... (Phoebe is shocked.) I just didn't want to tell you 'cause I didn't think that you'd return my love, and now that you have... (Leans in to kiss Rachel.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (moving away) Whoa! Whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa! Whoa! Whoa!

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Aww, look who's being suddenly shy. You can't tell me you don't feel what I feel. Nobody can kiss that good and not mean it. (Goes in again.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (moves away again) I-I-I-I'm just...I'm just a good kisser!

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: (suddenly frightened) Shut up!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm sorry!

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: (laughs) Oh you don't have to be (Laughs again) sorry. I'm...I'm obviously kidding. I'm not in love with you. (To Phoebe) I'm not in love with her. I don't hear coconuts banging together. Yeah, I don't...picture your face when I make love to my boyfriend. Anyway, I gotta go. Eh...kiss good-bye? (Rachel stares at her stunned.) No? Okay. (Hurries into the cab and drives off.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! I mean I had no idea that that was gonna...
Suddenly, Phoebe leans in and kisses her on the lips!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What the hell was that?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I just wanted to see what all the fuss was about.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I've had better.
Ending Credits
Ralph Lauren, Rachel is hooking Chandler up with another tuxedo.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (yelling from the changing room) All right! I found one that fits!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well y'know what they say, the 23rd time's the charm. (Chandler enters.) Aww, look at you all handsome!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Whose is it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh does it matter?! All that matters is that you look so handsome.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Whose is it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't want to say.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, come on! I don't care! Come on! Whose is it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Diane Keeton.
End
